description_long: This is a two-story modern house with a rectangular footprint, featuring a flat, dark gray roof and a symmetrical facade. The front of the house is defined by a wide balcony with white railings spanning the upper floor, and a covered porch below supported by columns. Large windows line both stories, providing ample natural light and a contemporary appearance. The property includes a paved driveway, two palm trees at the front, and a side area with a swimming pool, lounge chairs, and an umbrella. Several deciduous trees are positioned around the house, and a white car is parked on the driveway, enhancing the suburban residential setting.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, wide balconies, large windows, a front driveway, and a backyard pool area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, two palm trees, a wide balcony, and the driveway with a car; pool area visible to the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, car, and palm trees, with the house's rectangular shape and window rows visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back balcony, large windows, and the pool area with lounge chairs and umbrella; trees surround the property.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view focusing on the pool, umbrella, and lounge area, with the house's back and side facades visible.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with covered porch, columns, and wide balcony above; flanked by large windows and accessible via paved driveway.
